title: Brush teeth retry after backing out

turns.name: brush-teeth preview
turns.text: Help me brush my teeth in the morning and at night.

turns.name: brush-teeth cancel
turns.text: Actually never mind, do not save it yet.

turns.name: brush-teeth retry preview
turns.text: Okay actually yes, help me set up brushing my teeth in the morning and at night.

turns.name: brush-teeth retry confirm
turns.text: Yes, save that brushing routine now.
